title: doctor three-state (ready/degraded/blocked) + attest verb + version-scoped verdicts (D4/D5/D6)
action: SERIALIZED after g22-1 (advisor wave fix — same bee.mjs + registry file; worker rebases onto the g22-1 merge commit first). templates/bee.mjs doctor section: doctorOverallStatus -> three states: 'blocked' when any MECHANICAL blocking row not-ok; 'degraded' when mechanical ok but trust rows structurally unknown (re-class the 4 rows from blocking to degraded-class with degraded_reason naming /hooks); 'ready' = mechanical green + VALID attestation. New verb doctor.attest (registry + handler): records {hooks_file_sha256, codex_version, session_id, at, repo_identity} to a gitignored runtime-tier file. D5-REVISED validity (advisor R4 — the observation leg is CLAUDE-ONLY because hooks.jsonl is deny/crash-only and tools.jsonl is claude-only): codex VALID = current .codex/hooks.json sha matches + current codex --version matches + repo identity unchanged (static attest; the reason string says honestly that codex exposes no hook-fire event surface, so liveness is not attestable); claude VALID additionally requires one bee tool/hook event with ts > attestation.at in .bee/logs/tools.jsonl. Any failed leg -> attestation inert with the stale reason named -> degraded, never ready. D6: version-scope trust wording — probed-version constant (0.144.4); live codex --version differs -> rows say unprobed_version (suggest re-probe), never blanket unsupported. Fixtures in test_conformance.mjs + test_bee_cli.mjs: blocked / degraded / ready(static attest on codex) / stale (hash flip) / version-mismatch wording / claude observation leg. Mirrors + manifest.

truths: three states each proven by fixture: blocked / degraded / ready
ready requires a valid attestation incl. a post-attestation observed event; any of the four validity legs failing -> degraded with the stale reason named
trust verdict wording is version-scoped: live version != probed version -> unprobed_version, never blanket unsupported
attest verb is registry-complete (bijection + example) and writes only gitignored runtime-tier state

verify: node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
